clam_id: Claim ID. Primary key for the table
fill_dt: Fill Date as YYYY-MM-DD. fill_dt is in string format not date format so convert accordingly while querying this column
clam_stat: I = Initial Claim, F = Final Claim, S = Stand-Alone Claim
clam_type: PD = Paid, RJ = Rejected, RV = Reversed
rfil_cd: 0 = New Rx, else value = Refill Number
rfills_authrzd: Number of refills authorized on script
ptnt_cpay: Patient Out of Pocket (before any buy down)
ptnt_opc: Patient Out of Pocket (after any buy down)
buy_down: Buy Down (The secondary payer contribution towards buying down the copay)
chnl: Channel. R, M, A, or L (Retail, Mail, Atypical or Long Term Care)
model_type: PLAN MODEL TYPE (Med Adv, Mgd Medi, PMB PPO)
mthd_of_pmnt: Method Of Payment (Assistance, Commercial, Medicare, Medicaid, Cash)
scndry_pyr_yn: Y = Claim comes from a source that provides secondary payer claims
spec_desc: Specialty Description sample values for reference are : [HEMATOLOGY/ONCOLOGY, RHEUMATOLOGY, NURSE PRACTITIONER, PHYSICIAN ASSISTANT, DERMATOLOGY, FAMILY MEDICINE, MEDICAL ONCOLOGY, INTERNAL MEDICINE, OBSTETRICS & GYNECOLOGY, UROLOGY, REPRODUCTIVE ENDOCRINOLOGY & INFERTILITY, PEDIATRIC RHEUMATOLOGY, PEDIATRIC ENDOCRINOLOGY, GENERAL SURGERY, ENDOCRINOLOGY, DIABETES & METABOLISM, GASTROENTEROLOGY, GYNECOLOGICAL ONCOLOGY, NEPHROLOGY, PULMONARY CRITICAL CARE MEDICINE, NATUROPATHIC DOCTOR, GENERAL PRACTICE, OPHTHALMOLOGY, HEMATOLOGY (INTERNAL MEDICINE), PEDIATRICS, EMERGENCY MEDICINE, HOSPITALIST, PEDIATRIC GASTROENTEROLOGY]
prvdr_type: Provider Type Identifier, i.e. 1 = PROFESSIONAL, 2 = ORGANIZATION
diags_cd: Diagnosis Code included on Rx claim, if one exists
rej_cd: If Claim Type = RJ, this field will contain the reject code if one exists
life_cycl_yn: Y = Claim comes from a source that provides full life cycle of claims
seq_num: Use this field to sort patient claims in chronological order
pt_cycle_id: Patient Cycle ID or batch ID
